notes: All nine responses are clearly from the same model (Q3.6-35B-A3B) and are highly consistent: every response correctly identifies the crowded beach scene, blue-and-white striped beach huts, sailboats (pink/white/yellow), steamships with smoke, the blue-and-white ferry on the right, horses near the waterline, and the absence of text. Notably, NONE of the nine responses recognize the image as a Where's Waldo puzzle or attempt to locate Waldo, Odlaw, or Wizard Whitebeard — the central purpose of the image — so all score in the 5-7 range. Only rep2@t0.4 correctly identifies the far-right vessel as a hovercraft with fans on top (a GT-verified detail). Two clear hallucinations were flagged: cacti on the beach (rep0@t0.1) and a horse-drawn carriage in the water (rep1@t0.7, which GT explicitly excludes). Five of nine responses are truncated mid-sentence. Higher temperature (0.7) did not improve quality and introduced the carriage hallucination; the best responses came from t0.4.
